name: thailand-liveability-index
description: Thailand Liveability Index — public site source. A standalone, methodology-first liveability index for Thailand's 77 provinces with a sub-provincial zone overlay.

scripts.predev: npm run fetch-scores && npm run gen-widget-data
scripts.prebuild: npm run fetch-scores && npm run gen-og && npm run gen-redirects && npm run gen-widget-data

//optionalDependencies: Pinned platform bindings work around https://github.com/npm/cli/issues/4828 — npm sometimes drops these on incremental installs. Listing them explicitly forces re-resolution per platform. Safe on non-matching platforms (npm treats them as no-ops). Update the version pins when bumping the parent packages.
